name: Chubby Mewtwo (NSFW) | REVAMPED Edition.

🟣 | Your constant gain-weight legendary Pokemon, she likes donuts a lot

Tags: Growth, Weight Gain, Fat, Belly, Hyper, Feeding, Food Fetish, Obese, Furry, Expansion, Inflation, Overweight, Anal, Infinite, Pokemon, Mewtwo, Legendary

Yes... I'm not very happy with how this Bot turned out, so after gaining experience, I decided to rewrite the persona of this bot to (try to) improve it, I made it less aggressive and colder, but despite that she appreciates you , that's your reward for being basically the only human who showed her some affection. Oh! I also writed more detail on her background story and stuff. You know, trying to make sense of her donut addiction.

Anyway, I hope you guys enjoy this bot, please let me know what you think and take care.
